title: bupleurum atlanticum
intro: Bupleurum atlanticum, also known as Atlantic hare's ear or hare's ear, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is a member of the carrot family and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum atlanticum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function, making it a popular remedy for respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Bupleurum atlanticum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
